prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约7907名、8390名、20607名（2023年出现异常断档）、10715名、9436名。2023年断档后2024年大幅回弹至10715名，2025年 继续回升至9436名，近两年呈明显回升趋势，2025年基准约9436名；该校在河北省物理类招生计划2021年120人、2022年126人、2023年125人、2024年136人、20 25年138人，逐年小幅递增；2026年计划114人，较2025年减少24人，缩招约17.4%，招生名额明显收紧，将加剧竞争。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高 校；软科中国大学排名2026年第31名，近年稳定在29–32名区间，属于国内顶尖高校梯队；抖音学校热度总排名第16位，评价为"高热"，短视频平台曝光量大；近年声誉平稳，未见明显负面舆情或投档断档记录，报考关注度持续较高；第五轮学科评估中，化学A、机械工程A、工商管理A、土木工程A-、应用经济学A-、 控制科学与工程A-、电气工程A-、计算机科学与技术A-，工科与管理学科实力均衡，对考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化 等专业社会热度为"高热推荐"，与该校优势学科高度契合；河北省2026年普通高考总人数约60.98万，较2025年（约60.68万）略有增加，物理类考生按历史比例估算约36.6万人， 竞争基数扩大；省控线方面，物理类本科批从2021年412分持续上升至2025年459分，整体竞争压力加大。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次9436名、2026年招生计划大幅缩招 （-17.4%）、本省考生总数略有增加、学校声誉热度高、优势工科专业社会热度持续升温等因素，预计2026年物理类录取位次将较2025年明显前移（更难进）。预测最低位次约84 21名，区间7921–8921名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 7907, 8390, 20607 (an abnormal gap in 2023), 10715, and 9436. After the gap in 2023, it rebounded significantly to 10715 in 2024, and continued to rise to 9436 in 2025, showing a clear upward trend in the past two years, with a baseline of about 9436 in 2025. The enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hebei Province was 120 in 2021, 126 in 2022, 125 in 2023, 136 in 2024, and 138 in 2025, increasing slightly year by year. The plan for 2026 is 114, a decrease of 24 from 2025, a reduction of about 17.4%, significantly tightening enrollment quotas and intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 31st, and has been stable in the 29–32 range in recent years, belonging to the top tier of domestic universities. On Douyin, its overall popularity ranks 16th, rated as 'high heat', with high exposure on short video platforms. Its reputation has been stable in recent years, with no obvious negative public opinion or enrollment gaps, and application attention remains high. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chemistry A, Mechanical Engineering A, Business Administration A, Civil Engineering A-, Applied Economics A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, Electrical Engineering A-, and Computer Science and Technology A-, showing balanced strength in engineering and management disciplines, strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are rated as 'highly recommended' in social heat, highly aligned with the university's advantageous disciplines. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the Hebei Province general college entrance examination is about 609,800, a slight increase from about 606,800 in 2025. Physics Category candidates are estimated at about 366,000 based on historical proportions, expanding the competition base. Regarding the provincial control line, the Physics Category undergraduate batch has continuously risen from 412 in 2021 to 459 in 2025, increasing overall competitive pressure.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 9436, the significant reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (-17.4%), a slight increase in the total number of candidates in the province, high school reputation and heat, and the continuously rising social heat of advantageous engineering majors, it is expected that the 2026 Physics Category admission ranking will move significantly forward (harder to enter) compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 8421, with a range of 7921–8921.

- Computer Science and Technology (including Software Engineering)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation (including Automation, Electronic Information Engineering, etc.)
- Electronic Science and Technology

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 8421, range 7921–8921. For rankings within the range, it is recommended to use Tier 2 as the main choice, Tier 1 popular majors as a reach, and Tier 3 majors as safety. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 7900), focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors like Computer Science and Electrical Engineering. For rankings near the upper limit of the range (around 8900), it is recommended to mainly choose stable Tier 2 majors, with Tier 3 as safety.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 1161, 1424, 2627 (significantly shifted backward in 2023), 1474, and 1611. After a large backward shift in 2023, the ranking rebounded significantly to 1474 in 2024, then slightly shifted backward to 1611 in 2025, with a fluctuation range of 1474–1611 in the past two years, and a baseline of about 1611 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Hebei Province was 26 in 2021, 26 in 2022, 27 in 2023, 22 in 2024, and 23 in 2025, remaining stable in the 22–27 range in recent years. The 2026 plan is 59, an increase of 36 compared to 2025, an expansion of about 156.5%, significantly alleviating competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked 31st in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in the 29–32 range in recent years, belonging to the top tier of domestic universities. Ranked 16th in Douyin school popularity, rated as 'high heat', with high exposure on short video platforms. Reputation has been stable in recent years, with no significant negative public opinion, and sustained high application attention. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, business administration (A) and applied economics (A-) show strong performance in economics and management disciplines, highly matching the History Category enrollment majors (economics, finance, accounting, etc.), strongly attracting liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of finance/finance/economics majors is 'differentiated wait-and-see', law is 'differentiated wait-and-see', accounting/finance/auditing is 'recommended', with overall liberal arts economics and management majors having medium-to-high popularity. The total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Hebei Province in 2026 is about 609,800, with History Category candidates estimated at about 244,000 based on historical proportions, roughly the same as 2025 (243,700). Regarding the provincial control line, the History Category undergraduate batch has fluctuated upward from 454 in 2021 to 477 in 2025, with a stable overall competitive environment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1611, the significant expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (+156.5%), the basically unchanged total number of candidates in the province, the high reputation and popularity of the school, and the matching advantageous disciplines in economics and management, it is expected that the 2026 History Category admission ranking will shift significantly backward compared to 2025 (easier to enter). The predicted minimum ranking is about 3104, with a range of 2638–3570.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Law
- Chinese Language and Literature (can be selected into the Humanities Experimental Class after enrollment)
- Economics Class (including Economics, Public Finance, International Economics and Trade).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- No other History Category enrollment majors (only the above 5 majors are offered for History Category in 2026).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 3104, range 2638–3570. Candidates within the range are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors with Tier 1 as a sprint; candidates significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 2600) can focus on sprinting for popular majors like Law and Economics Class; candidates near the upper limit (around 3500) are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors like Accounting and Finance. Due to the significant expansion of History Category in 2026, the admission ranking will shift backward significantly, greatly increasing candidates' chances of admission.
